backend/main.mo: Main actor for the 15sec video platform, managing video posts, replies, user profiles, follow relationships, notifications, and visitor statistics with admin access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades actor state from an older schema to a new one by adding empty daily, weekly, monthly, and all-time visitor tracking maps/sets.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of four visitor stat counter cards (daily, weekly, monthly, all-time) on the Admin Dashboard page, referencing the relevant frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and recent changes of components, hooks, and pages in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and handles authentication state and username setup modal display.
frontend/src/components/Branding.tsx: Simple branding component rendering the '15sec' app name with an animated pulsing red dot.
frontend/src/components/CookieConsent.ts: Cookie consent banner component that appears once per user (stored in localStorage) and provides an accept button to dismiss it.
frontend/src/components/FollowButton.tsx: Button component that toggles follow/unfollow state for a target user principal, using React Query mutations and displaying loading/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with consistent border and muted styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with links to Home, Create, Notifications (with unread badge), Admin (if applicable), and Account pages, displaying the user's avatar when available.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login card that prompts unauthenticated users to sign in via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Dropdown panel that lists user notifications (likes, shares, replies), marks them as read on mount, and navigates to the relevant video or profile on click.
frontend/src/components/ReplyDialog.tsx: Modal dialog that wraps the VideoReplyCreator component, allowing users to record or upload a short video reply to a parent video.
frontend/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx: Modal dialog for sharing a video post or reply, offering copy-to-clipboard and internal platform share actions.
frontend/src/components/UsernameSetupMod: Blocking modal that prompts new users to choose a unique username, with debounced availability checking before saving their profile.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCard.ts: Card component displaying a video post with creator avatar, like/reply/share actions, and an optional delete button for owners or admins.
frontend/src/components/VideoPostCreator: A form component that accepts a video file and title input, uploads the video with progress tracking, and creates a new video post via the `useCreateVideoPost` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/VideoRecorder.ts: A camera-based video recorder component that uses the device camera to record video up to a configurable max duration, then returns the recorded file via a callback.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCard.t: Displays a single video reply card with the creator's avatar, video playback, and like/share/reply/delete actions, navigating to user profiles on avatar click.
frontend/src/components/VideoReplyCreato: A multi-mode component for creating video replies to a post, supporting both file upload and camera recording, with upload progress tracking and submission via `useCreateVideoReply`.
frontend/src/components/VideoUploader.ts: A file-picker component for selecting video files that automatically trims videos exceeding a configurable max duration using canvas and MediaRecorder before passing the file to a callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor (identity) changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin operations, video posts/replies, notifications, and visitor stats.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties for the design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: User account management page allowing profile editing (username, avatar), viewing own posts/replies, managing account deletion, and logout.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying user management (promote, demote, delete), active account counts, and visitor statistics, restricted to admin users.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePage.tsx: Page for creating new video posts, supporting both file upload and in-browser recording modes before submitting via VideoPostCreator.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home feed page that fetches and displays all video posts sorted by timestamp, with loading skeletons and an empty state message.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays a user's public profile page including avatar, follow stats, and tabbed views of their video posts and replies, with follow/unfollow functionality for other users.
frontend/src/pages/VideoDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single video post with paginated replies, allowing users to load more replies incrementally and navigate back to the feed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, custom CSS variable-based color tokens, border radius, Inter font family, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features and pending feature requests, specifically focused on adding unique visitor tracking counters (daily, weekly, monthly, all-time) to the admin dashboard page.
